description: Below-level extreme: C1 student reads a simple A1/A2 passage. Everything in the passage is well below C1's range (C1-C2). All three lists should be empty or near-empty. expectedTextFit is too_easy.
passage: Tom has a big dog. The dog is brown and white. Tom likes to walk the dog every morning. They go to the park together. The dog runs fast and plays with other dogs. Tom is happy when his dog is happy.
